summary: CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) Bump-Version.Tests.ps1 is missing — task requires all tests in Pester and workflow references it at line 18 but file not provided. (2) Actions not SHA-pinned — requirement explicitly demands full-length commit SHA; workflow uses @v4 (line 14). (3) workflow_dispatch inputs defined but unused (lines 8-11). (4) Massive duplication: test fixtures repeated identically at lines 51-58, 60-65, 67-74, 76-83; assertions repeated at lines 86-96, 110-120, 134-144, 158-170 — should be loop or composite action. (5) PowerShell scripts lack Set-StrictMode. Core logic is sound but integration is incomplete and fragile.
